input_prompt: Retrieve the is_verified, id, email, username in users -- get active users -- looking only at username is not equal to 'activity', combined with (removing duplicates) Retrieve the is_verified, id, email, username in users looking only at country_code like 'b%' (filter by country prefix) ordered by is_verified.
gold_sql: SELECT u1.is_verified, u1.id, u1.email, u1.username FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.username <> 'activity' UNION SELECT u2.is_verified, u2.id, u2.email, u2.username FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.country_code LIKE 'b%' ORDER BY is_verified
generated_response:
SELECT DISTINCT u.is_verified, u.id, u.email, u.username
FROM users u
WHERE u.username != 'activity'
  AND u.country_code LIKE 'b%'
ORDER BY u.is_verified

input_prompt: choose the id, country_code, signup_date, email from users for which id less than 11, combined with (removing duplicates) choose the id, country_code, signup_date, email from users for which signup_date greater than 25 days ago

generated_response:
SELECT id, country_code, signup_date, email FROM users WHERE id < 11
UNION
SELECT id, country_code, signup_date, email FROM users WHERE signup_date > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 25 DAY)

input_prompt: So, I kind of need to retrieve the verified_status, id, email, user_handle FROM members looking only at user_handle is not equal to 'activity', combined with, you know, (removing duplicates) Retrieve the verified_status, id, email, user_handle FROM members WHERE country_code like 'b%' ordered by verified_status, I think.
gold_sql: SELECT u1.is_verified, u1.id, u1.email, u1.username FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.username <> 'activity' UNION SELECT u2.is_verified, u2.id, u2.email, u2.username FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.country_code LIKE 'b%' ORDER BY is_verified

input_prompt: delete likes where likes.liked_at greater than or equal to within the last 25 days
gold_sql: DELETE FROM likes WHERE likes.liked_at >= DATETIME('now', '-25 days')

input_prompt: Spot all columns in follows LEFT JOIN users on follower_id equals id. -- urgent request
gold_sql: SELECT * FROM follows AS f1 LEFT JOIN users AS u6 ON f1.follower_id = u6.id
generated_response: SELECT * FROM follows f LEFT JOIN users u ON f.follower_id = u.id

input_prompt: Pull up the id, country_code, signup_date, email from users for which id less than 11, combined with (removing duplicates) grab the id, country_code, signup_date, email from users for which signup_date greater than 25 days ago
gold_sql: SELECT u1.id, u1.country_code, u1.signup_date, u1.email FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.id < 11 UNION SELECT u2.id, u2.country_code, u2.signup_date, u2.email FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.signup_date > DATETIME('now', '-25 days')
generated_response:
SELECT id, country_code, signup_date, email FROM users WHERE id < 11
UNION
SELECT id, country_code, signup_date, email FROM users WHERE signup_date > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 25 DAY)

input_prompt: SELECT * FROM comments RIGHT JOIN users ON user_id equals id WHERE email LIKE '%@gmail.com'.

generated_response: SELECT * FROM comments RIGHT JOIN users ON comments.user_id = users.id WHERE users.email LIKE '%@gmail.com'

input_prompt: SELECT the user_id, post_id FROM likes WHERE post_id is not equal to 293, combined with (including duplicates) SELECT the user_id, post_id FROM likes WHERE user_id less than or equal to 777
gold_sql: SELECT l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.post_id <> 293 UNION ALL SELECT l2.user_id, l2.post_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id <= 777
generated_response:
SELECT user_id, post_id FROM likes WHERE post_id != 293
UNION ALL
SELECT user_id, post_id FROM likes WHERE user_id <= 777
